message:
✨ Full EPG timeline on failover group rows in guide view (#99)

- Failover group rows now render with same layout as regular guide rows:
  200px channel panel + scrollable EPG programme blocks
- EPG data sourced from first member with valid EPG mapping
- Expanded members show as compact sub-rows with provider name
- Individual grouped channels hidden from main channel listing
- Add 'Add to Group' button for adding channels to existing groups

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
